mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_no, email, pw, user_name, image_no) VALUES (seq_user_no.nextVal, #{email}, #{pw}, #{userName}, #{imageNo})
mapper.select: SELECT verification_code AS verificationCode, expire_date AS expireDate FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE email = #{email} AND google_api IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (user_no, email, google_api, user_name, image_no) VALUES (seq_user_no.nextVal, #{email}, #{googleApi}, #{userName}, #{imageNo})
mapper.select: SELECT space_key, user_no, user_role, invite_code FROM space_members WHERE user_no = #{userNo} AND invite_code IS NOT NULL AND expire_date > SYSDATE
